cycle_policy.summary: Cycles are allowed only when they describe co-evolutionary relationships, not circular build instructions.
cycle_policy.strictCycleRule: A cycle containing strict edges is invalid unless every strict edge in that cycle has cycle_ok: true and a cycle_reason explaining the historically plausible co-evolution.

nodes.title: Abrasive grit
nodes.summary: Hard granular material selected, sorted, and used to scrape, smooth, sharpen, polish, and test surfaces.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; mineral availability and historical abrasive use need human source review.

nodes.title: Alignment checking
nodes.summary: A workshop test practice for checking whether wheels, shafts, frames, holes, and guide surfaces point where they should.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; historical workshop testing practices need human source review.

nodes.title: Apprenticeship
nodes.summary: A social technology for transmitting workshop habits, safety norms, quality standards, tool care, and tacit craft knowledge across workers and generations.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; institutional and historical claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Basketry
nodes.summary: The craft of weaving flexible plant, bark, root, reed, or fiber materials into containers, frames, strainers, traps, and lightweight structures.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; regional plant and basketry history claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Bicycle
nodes.summary: A narrow human-powered vehicle that turns balancing, light wheels, low-friction bearings, steering, and workshop alignment into efficient personal transport.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; bicycle history, material choices, and regional feasibility need human source review.

nodes.title: Bone and antler
nodes.summary: Hard animal materials shaped into points, wedges, handles, needles, bearings, toggles, scrapers, and small tool parts.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; archaeological and material claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Cart
nodes.summary: A wheeled load carrier that combines wheels, axle support, frame, load bed, pulling method, and maintenance habits.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; vehicle history and regional road assumptions need human source review.

nodes.title: Ceramic temper
nodes.summary: Non-plastic additions such as sand, grog, shell, grit, or fiber blended with clay to control shrinkage, cracking, workability, and fired behavior.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; ceramic material claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Charcoal
nodes.summary: Carbon-rich fuel made by heating wood with limited air, useful where cleaner, hotter, lighter, or more predictable fuel is needed.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; species and historical production claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Clay
nodes.summary: Fine mineral sediment that can be shaped wet and hardened by drying or firing for vessels, bricks, molds, tablets, and kiln structures.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; geology and ceramic claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Cordage fiber
nodes.summary: Plant or animal fiber selected, extracted, cleaned, and bundled for rope, thread, lashings, nets, basketry, and weaving.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; species and processing claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Counting
nodes.summary: A shared method for keeping track of number, order, quantity, and repeated work.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; anthropology and history claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Cutting edge
nodes.summary: A sharpened stone, bone, shell, wood, or metal edge used for cutting, scraping, trimming, marking, and shaping workshop materials.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; material-specific edge claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Firekeeping
nodes.summary: The practical discipline of starting, feeding, observing, containing, banking, extinguishing, and teaching controlled fire for workshop use.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; fire-history and safety claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Flax fiber
nodes.summary: Long bast fiber from flax stems, prepared for thread, cordage, woven cloth, fine lashings, and composite workshop uses.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; cultivation and processing claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Grog
nodes.summary: Crushed fired clay or sherd material reused as ceramic temper for controlling shrinkage, cracking, and texture.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; ceramic recycling and material claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Hand drill
nodes.summary: A hand-powered boring tool for making holes in wood, bone, leather, clay, shell, and soft stone.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; drill-type chronology and material claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Hide glue
nodes.summary: Reversible collagen glue made from animal scrap, useful for woodworking, bindings, repairs, sizing, and temporary fixtures.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; adhesive history and process details need human source review.

nodes.title: Ink
nodes.summary: A mark-making fluid or paste that carries pigment or dye onto paper, parchment, wood, clay labels, or other record surfaces.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; pigment and binder claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Kiln
nodes.summary: A heat-retaining enclosure for firing clay, drying materials, making lime, and later supporting higher-temperature workshop processes.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; firing ranges and kiln history need human source review.

nodes.title: Kiln firing test
nodes.summary: A comparative test practice for judging clay bodies, temper, kiln placement, fuel behavior, and finished ceramic quality without relying on guesswork.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; ceramic history and firing behavior claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Leather
nodes.summary: Preserved animal hide prepared as flexible sheet, strap, hinge, gasket, bearing cover, bucket, bellows part, and protective material.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; tanning history and regional claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Lever
nodes.summary: A rigid bar used around a fulcrum to trade distance for force in lifting, prying, pressing, and control mechanisms.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; historical and technical claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Measuring rod
nodes.summary: A stable marked length standard used to transfer dimensions, compare parts, lay out work, and teach repeatable construction.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; metrology history and unit claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Paper
nodes.summary: A thin sheet made from interlocked fibers, useful for records, drawings, labels, patterns, teaching, and administrative memory.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; historical papermaking claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Plain bearing
nodes.summary: A low-friction rubbing surface or sleeve that lets a shaft turn or pivot with controlled wear.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; historical bearing materials and chronology need human source review.

nodes.title: Plumb line
nodes.summary: A cord and weight used to find vertical, align posts, check walls, mark centers, and teach gravity-based reference lines.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; historical use claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Potter's wheel
nodes.summary: A rotating work platform that lets a potter shape clay symmetrically with steady hand pressure.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; ceramic chronology and wheel forms need human source review.

nodes.title: Pulley
nodes.summary: A grooved wheel or roller that guides rope, changes force direction, and can combine with other pulleys for lifting advantage.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; load claims and historical details need human source review.

nodes.title: Rope
nodes.summary: Twisted or braided fibers that carry tension for hauling, lifting, tying, measuring, and transmitting force.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; fiber availability and preparation claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Rope making
nodes.summary: The process of preparing fibers and laying them into cord, line, or rope with enough consistency for tying, hauling, and lifting tests.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; fiber preparation and regional availability need human source review.

nodes.title: Sanitation norms
nodes.summary: Shared rules for separating waste, drinking water, food handling, washing, burial, drainage, and sickness response.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; historical public-health claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Spindle
nodes.summary: A rotating shaft and optional whorl used to twist fiber into thread or yarn for cordage, weaving, stitching, and bindings.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; textile-tool chronology and material claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Spoked wheel
nodes.summary: A wheel built from hub, spokes, and rim so it can stay large while using less material than a solid disk.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; wheel-building chronology and joinery details need human source review.

nodes.title: Standard weights
nodes.summary: Agreed reference masses used to compare materials, loads, trade quantities, tests, and batch records.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; metrology history needs human source review.

nodes.title: Stone hammer
nodes.summary: A selected stone used to strike, break, peen, wedge, crush, rough-shape, and test materials before specialized metal hammers exist.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; lithic and regional claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Technical drawing
nodes.summary: A shared drawing practice for communicating shape, size, parts, assembly, and revisions before or during construction.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; history of drawing conventions needs human source review.

nodes.title: Tensile test
nodes.summary: A controlled pull test for comparing rope, fiber, thread, straps, joints, and other materials that fail in tension.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; test method history and safety limits need human source review.

nodes.title: Timber
nodes.summary: Felled and selected wood prepared as a structural material for frames, handles, axles, wheels, benches, jigs, and buildings.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; local species and historical forestry claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Timber seasoning
nodes.summary: The controlled drying and sorting of timber so wooden parts shrink less, warp less, and hold joints more predictably.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; timber behavior and regional species claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Try-square
nodes.summary: A right-angle checking and marking tool used to make frames, boxes, wheels, benches, and drawings more repeatable.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; tool history claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Water
nodes.summary: The workshop supply chain for finding, carrying, settling, storing, and judging usable water for clay, ink, paper, glue, washing, and tests.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; hydrology, health, and regional availability claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Water settling test
nodes.summary: A simple separation and recognition test that uses water and time to compare clay, silt, sand, grit, fiber, and other suspended solids.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; sediment classification claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Weaving
nodes.summary: The organized interlacing of thread, yarn, fiber, or strips into cloth, straps, screens, bags, belts, and technical fabrics.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; textile history and regional claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Wheel and axle
nodes.summary: A rotating round member fixed to a central shaft, useful for carts, pulleys, windlasses, potter's wheels, and later transport systems.

nodes.title: Woodworking
nodes.summary: The practical craft of selecting, shaping, joining, boring, smoothing, and repairing wood for tools, frames, wheels, fixtures, and buildings.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; regional timber and tool-history claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Workshop records
nodes.summary: A recordkeeping practice for batches, sources, tests, tools, dimensions, failures, and trusted procedures.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; administrative and historical claims need human source review.

nodes.title: Writing
nodes.summary: A durable symbol system and teaching practice for records, labels, instructions, measurements, and plans.

source_review_notes: No source pack was used; literacy and historical claims need human source review.

diagnostics.message: Accepted co-evolutionary graph cycle: ink -> paper -> ink.
